name: huawei-ccm
description: OctoBus package for Huawei Cloud CCM (Cloud Certificate Manager) query APIs.

Huawei_CCM.Huawei_CCM/ListCertificates.name: list-certificates
Huawei_CCM.Huawei_CCM/ListCertificates.description: List all SSL certificates in the Huawei Cloud account.

Huawei_CCM.Huawei_CCM/GetCertificate.name: get-certificate
Huawei_CCM.Huawei_CCM/GetCertificate.description: Get detailed info for a specific certificate.
